hero.subtitle: Transfer playlists and sync across Apple Music, Spotify, and YouTube Music — move from Spotify to Apple or anywhere else, then keep everything aligned automatically.
perks.transfer.title: Transfer your music
perks.transfer.body: Transfer the music you love to the music provider you want.
perks.share.title: Share your playlists
perks.share.body: Share playlists with anyone, regardless of their music streaming platform.
perks.sync.title: Keep playlists in sync
perks.sync.body: Sync additions from your playlist to your destination music streaming platform.
transfer.title: Playlist transfer and sync
how.title: How it works
how.step1.title: Connect your services
how.step1.body: Hook up Apple Music, Spotify, and YouTube Music. Once connected, you can use each service as a source or destination for transfers and ongoing sync.
how.step2.title: Configure your Mixport
how.step2.body: Tell Mixport which playlists, songs, or albums you would like to be transferred to a different music streaming service.
how.step3.title: Review matches
how.step3.body: After Mixport has matched all of your songs on your destination service, you are given the opportunity to fix any mismatches.
how.step4.title: Enjoy!
how.step4.body: Mixport will quickly finish the transfer and the songs will appear in your destination music library moments later. Tada! 🎉
support.title: Support
support.lede: Need help? Open the Support Center in the app (Settings ⚙️ → Support Center), start a ticket, and attach the relevant Mixport so our team can investigate quickly.
faq.title: FAQs
faq.lede: Quick answers on services, transfers, playlist sync, limits, and privacy.
faq.q1: Which music services can I connect?
faq.a1: Mixport connects Apple Music, Spotify, and YouTube Music today, with Amazon Music on our roadmap. Use your regular consumer accounts; just sign in and approve access so we can read playlists and create matches.
faq.a2: Pick a source and destination, choose whether you’re moving playlists, albums, or songs, and we auto-match tracks. You review any suggested fixes, then start the transfer. Pro users can run cloud transfers that are dramatically faster and don’t require keeping the app open.
faq.q3: What’s the difference between transfers and playlist monitoring?
faq.a3: Transfers move content over once. Playlist monitoring (Pro) keeps a playlist in sync automatically—updates run at the top of the hour, and you can force a sync from Transfer Details or the widget’s “Sync now” button.
faq.q4: What are the Free vs Pro limits?
faq.a4: Free: no cloud transfers, playlist transfers capped at 25 songs, and you can move 1 album or 1 song per transfer. Pro: unlocks cloud transfers, playlist monitoring, and higher-capacity, faster moves.
faq.a5: We use multi-signal matching with close-candidate suggestions when an exact match isn’t certain. You can quickly approve or swap picks before transferring for the best possible result.
faq.a6: If a login fails, re-authenticate the service and retry. If tracks are missing, check if they’re available in your region or on the destination service, then run “Sync now.” If a sync stalls, force a sync from the widget or Transfer Details. Still stuck? Contact support with the playlist name and source/destination.
faq.a7: We don’t collect personal identifiers. We store only the access needed to read and create playlists and matches. You can revoke access anytime by disconnecting a service in-app, which also clears our stored tokens.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Mixport, provided by Hagerlabs, LLC (“Hagerlabs,” “we,” “us,” or “our”). By accessing or using our app, website, and related services (collectively, the “Service”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service.
terms.use.heading: Use of the Service
terms.use.item1: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service.
terms.use.item2: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.
terms.use.item3: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the Service at any time.
terms.accounts.heading: Accounts & Security
terms.accounts.item1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.accounts.item2: You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.billing.heading: Subscriptions & Billing
terms.billing.body: Some features may require a paid subscription or in-app purchase processed by Apple or other platforms. Billing is governed by the platform’s terms. Refunds, if any, are handled by the platform or our payment partner.
terms.acceptable.heading: Acceptable Use
terms.acceptable.body: You agree not to misuse the Service, interfere with its operation, or attempt to access it using methods other than the interface and instructions we provide. You will comply with third-party platform policies (e.g., Apple Music, Spotify) when using integrations.
terms.ip.heading: Intellectual Property
terms.ip.body: Mixport and all related content are owned by Hagerlabs or our licensors. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of the Service without our written permission.
terms.disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer of Warranties
terms.disclaimer.body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED “AS IS” AND “AS AVAILABLE” WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.
terms.liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
terms.liability.body: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, HAGERLABS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES.
terms.changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
terms.changes.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
